meta.title: 网络语言和流行语
meta.description: Intermediate internet slang vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: buzzwords, memes, and internet culture.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급~중급 인터넷 신조어 어휘와 문형: 유행어, 밈, 인터넷 문화.

questions.prompt: 「网络流行语」是什么意思？(What does 网络流行语 mean?)
「表情包」是什么意思？(What does 表情包 mean?)

explanation.en: 「梗」(gěng) in internet slang means "a running joke/meme reference" that people understand from shared context.
explanation.ko: 「梗」(gěng)는 인터넷 용어로 공유된 맥락에서 이해되는 '유행 개그/밈'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「梗」在网络用语中是什么意思？(What does 梗 mean in internet slang?)

explanation.en: 「打卡」(dǎkǎ) originally meant "to clock in/out" at work, now also means to check in at a popular location or complete a daily task.
explanation.ko: 「打卡」(dǎkǎ)는 원래 '출퇴근 체크'라는 뜻이었으나 요즘은 '핫플레이스 인증/일일 과제 완수'라는 뜻으로도 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 「打卡」是什么意思？(What does 打卡 mean?)
choices: 打卡(to check in [at a place/task])

explanation.en: 「内卷」(nèijuǎn) means "involution", referring to intense, unproductive competition where everyone works harder without real progress.
explanation.ko: 「内卷」(nèijuǎn)는 다들 더 열심히 하지만 실질적 진전 없이 소모적으로 경쟁하는 것을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「内卷」是什么意思？(What does 内卷 mean?)
这个___最近很火，很多人都在用。(This internet buzzword has been very popular recently, many people are using it.)
我给朋友发了一个搞笑的___，他笑得停不下来。(I sent my friend a funny meme, he couldn't stop laughing.)
这个___在网上已经流行很久了，大家都懂这个意思。(This meme reference has been popular online for a long time, everyone understands what it means.)

explanation.en: 「打卡」here means "to check in at a location".

questions.prompt: 很多人喜欢去网红餐厅___，拍照发朋友圈。(Many people like to check in at popular restaurants, taking photos to post on social media.)
现在的年轻人常常抱怨工作和学习中的___现象。(Young people nowadays often complain about the phenomenon of "involution" in work and study.)
这个词最早是___的，后来变成了大家都用的流行语。(This word originally came from the internet, later became a buzzword that everyone uses.)
虽然网络流行语很有趣，___有些用法并不规范。(Although internet buzzwords are interesting, some usages aren't standard.)
这个流行语不但年轻人在用，___一些长辈也开始使用了。(Not only are young people using this buzzword, but some elders have also started using it.)

explanation.en: 「是」emphasizes the origin: 是源自〜 = "originates from 〜".
explanation.ko: 「是」는 출처를 강조하며 '是源自〜'는 '~에서 유래했다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这个梗___源自一部很火的网络剧。(This meme reference originates from a very popular web drama.)
网络流行语变化很快，___很难跟上最新的说法。(Internet buzzwords change quickly, so it's hard to keep up with the latest expressions.)
有些网络流行语___了社会现象，反映了年轻人的心态。(Some internet buzzwords capture social phenomena, reflecting young people's mindset.)

explanation.en: 「收录」(shōulù) means "to include/incorporate [in a dictionary or collection]".

questions.prompt: 这个词已经被___进了官方词典，成为了正式词汇。(This word has already been officially incorporated into the dictionary, becoming a formal vocabulary word.)
网络流行语的___速度非常快，很多词几个月就过时了。(The speed at which internet buzzwords go out of fashion is very fast, many words become outdated in a few months.)
这个表情包因为太搞笑，在网上被___转发了无数次。(This meme, because it's so funny, has been reposted countless times online.)
很多网络流行语来自游戏或者___，年轻人一听就懂。(Many internet buzzwords come from games or dramas, young people understand as soon as they hear them.)

explanation.en: 「在」(progressive marker) must come right before the verb 用 (use): 在用 (not 用在).
explanation.ko: 진행형 표지 「在」는 동사 '用' 바로 앞에 와야 하므로 '在用'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这个网络流行语最近很火，很多人都用在。(This internet buzzword has been very popular recently, many people are using it.) — find the error
choices: 这个网络流行语最近很火，很多人都在用。
这个网络流行语最近很火，很多人都用在。
这个网络流行语最近很火，很多人在都用。
这个网络流行语最近很火，都很多人在用。

explanation.en: 「但是」must come at the start of the second clause, before 有些用法: 但是有些用法〜 (not 有些用法但是〜).
explanation.ko: 「但是」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, '有些用法' 앞에 와야 하므로 '但是有些用法〜'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 虽然网络流行语很有趣，有些用法但是并不规范。(Although internet buzzwords are interesting, some usages aren't standard.) — find the error
choices: 虽然网络流行语很有趣，但是有些用法并不规范。
虽然网络流行语很有趣，有些用法但是并不规范。
虽然网络流行语很有趣，但是并不规范有些用法。
虽然网络流行语很有趣，有些但是用法并不规范。

explanation.en: 「进」(the directional complement) must come right after the verb 收录, before the object 官方词典: 收录进了官方词典 (not 收录官方词典进了).
explanation.ko: 방향보어 「进」은 동사 '收录' 바로 뒤, 목적어 '官方词典' 앞에 와야 하므로 '收录进了官方词典'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 这个词已经被收录官方词典进了，成为了正式词汇。(This word has already been officially incorporated into the dictionary.) — find the error
choices: 这个词已经被收录进了官方词典，成为了正式词汇。
这个词已经被收录官方词典进了，成为了正式词汇。
这个词已经被进了收录官方词典，成为了正式词汇。
这个词已经收录被进了官方词典，成为了正式词汇。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这个网络流行语最近很火，很多人都在用 ("This internet buzzword has been very popular recently, many people are using it").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这个网络流行语最近很火，很多人都在用' (이 인터넷 유행어는 최근 매우 인기가 많아 많은 사람들이 쓰고 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这个网络流行语最近很火，__________。(This internet buzzword has been very popular recently, many people are using it.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 虽然网络流行语很有趣，但是有些用法并不规范 ("Although internet buzzwords are interesting, some usages aren't standard").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '虽然网络流行语很有趣，但是有些用法并不规范' (인터넷 유행어는 재미있지만 일부 용법은 표준적이지 않다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 虽然网络流行语很有趣，__________并不规范。(Although internet buzzwords are interesting, some usages aren't standard.)
